title: Vulnlog Report Entry
description: Records that a specific SCA scanner or other source reported a vulnerability.

reporter.description: The scanner or source type that reported this vulnerability.

at.description: Date the vulnerability was reported. When omitted, the CLI uses the current date during output generation.

source.description: Description of the report source. Optional for scanner reporters. Required by the CLI for reporter type 'other'.

vuln_id.description: Scanner-specific vulnerability identifiers. Used when generating scanner-specific suppression files.

suppressEntry.description: Suppression configuration for a specific scanner. When present without expires_at, the suppression is permanent.

expires_at.description: Expiration date of the suppression. When omitted, the suppression is permanent.
